categoryDescriptions.privacy: Control your privacy settings and data collection
categoryDescriptions.network: Optimize network settings for lower latency. Ethernet recommended for best results.
categoryDescriptions.input: Configure mouse and keyboard input settings
categoryDescriptions.security: Disable security mitigations for maximum performance. High risk - use with caution.
categoryDescriptions.hardware: Configure hardware interrupt settings for reduced latency
categoryDescriptions.memory: Optimize memory management and paging settings

win32PrioritySeparation.name: Win32 Priority Separation
win32PrioritySeparation.description: Configure CPU time slice allocation for foreground applications
win32PrioritySeparation.details: Adjusts how Windows distributes CPU time between foreground and background processes. Gaming mode prioritizes foreground apps for better game performance. May cause background tasks to run slower.

disablePagingExecutive.name: Disable Paging Executive
disablePagingExecutive.description: Keep kernel drivers in RAM instead of paging to disk for better performance
disablePagingExecutive.details: Prevents Windows from moving kernel components to the page file. Improves system responsiveness but requires more RAM. Recommended for systems with 16GB+ RAM.

clearPageFileShutdown.name: Clear Page File at Shutdown
clearPageFileShutdown.description: Clear virtual memory page file during shutdown (increases shutdown time)
clearPageFileShutdown.details: Writes zeros to the page file during shutdown for security. Significantly increases shutdown time on systems with large page files or slow storage.

largeSystemCache.name: Large System Cache
largeSystemCache.description: Prioritize system cache over application working set
largeSystemCache.details: Increases the system cache size, beneficial for file servers and workstations with heavy file I/O. May reduce performance for gaming or applications that need more RAM.

bootOptimizeFunction.name: Boot Optimize Function
bootOptimizeFunction.description: Enable boot optimization for faster startup times
bootOptimizeFunction.details: Optimizes file placement on disk for faster boot. Requires periodic idle time to optimize. Works best with HDDs; minimal impact on SSDs.

prefetcher.name: Prefetcher
prefetcher.description: Configure prefetch behavior for application and boot optimization
prefetcher.details: Caches application and boot data for faster loading. Disabling may help with SSD wear but slows down application launch times.

classicContextMenu.name: Classic Context Menu
classicContextMenu.description: Restore the classic Windows 10-style right-click context menu in Windows 11
classicContextMenu.details: Replaces the Windows 11 simplified context menu with the full classic menu. Removes the need to click 'Show more options' to access all context menu items.

disableTelemetry.name: Disable Telemetry
disableTelemetry.description: Stop Windows from collecting and sending diagnostic data to Microsoft
disableTelemetry.details: Disables Windows telemetry services and data collection. Prevents Microsoft from collecting usage data, system information, and error reports. May affect Windows Update delivery optimization and some diagnostic features.

disableCEIP.name: Disable Customer Experience Improvement Program
disableCEIP.description: Disable participation in Microsoft's telemetry programs
disableCEIP.details: Opts out of Microsoft's Customer Experience Improvement Program for both Windows and .NET Framework. Stops sending usage statistics and feedback to Microsoft.

disableWER.name: Disable Windows Error Reporting
disableWER.description: Stop Windows from sending error reports to Microsoft
disableWER.details: Prevents Windows from sending error reports when applications crash. Error reports help Microsoft fix bugs, but disabling improves privacy. Local error logs are still generated.

disableAppCompat.name: Disable Application Compatibility Telemetry
disableAppCompat.description: Disable collection of application compatibility data
disableAppCompat.details: Disables the Program Compatibility Assistant and application compatibility data collection. Some older applications may have reduced compatibility assistance.

disableAdvertising.name: Disable Advertising ID
disableAdvertising.description: Disable the advertising identifier used for personalized ads
disableAdvertising.details: Disables the unique advertising ID that apps use for personalized advertising. Apps will still show ads, but they will be less targeted to your interests.

disableSilentApps.name: Disable Silent App Installation
disableSilentApps.description: Prevent Windows from automatically installing suggested apps
disableSilentApps.details: Prevents Windows from automatically downloading and installing promoted apps like Candy Crush, Twitter, or other sponsored content without your consent.

disableSuggestions.name: Disable Suggestions and Tips
disableSuggestions.description: Disable Windows suggestions, tips, and tutorials
disableSuggestions.details: Removes tips, tricks, and suggestions that appear in Start menu, Settings, and throughout Windows. Also disables the 'Welcome' experience after updates.

disableCortana.name: Disable Cortana and Web Search
disableCortana.description: Disable Cortana voice assistant and web search in Start menu
disableCortana.details: Disables Cortana and removes web search results from Start menu searches. Search will only show local files and applications. Voice activation features will be unavailable.

disableLocation.name: Disable Location Services
disableLocation.description: Disable Windows location services and sensors
disableLocation.details: Disables location services system-wide. Maps, weather apps, and other location-aware applications will not function correctly. Can be overridden per-app in Settings.

disableSettingSync.name: Disable Settings Sync
disableSettingSync.description: Prevent Windows from syncing settings to the cloud
disableSettingSync.details: Prevents Windows from syncing your settings, passwords, and preferences to Microsoft servers. Settings won't sync across your devices. OneDrive settings sync may also be affected.

disableActivityFeed.name: Disable Activity History
disableActivityFeed.description: Disable Windows activity history and timeline features
disableActivityFeed.details: Disables the Timeline feature and activity history collection. Your activity on this PC won't be tracked or synced. Timeline view in Task View will be empty.

disableOnlineSpeech.name: Disable Online Speech Recognition
disableOnlineSpeech.details: Disables Microsoft's cloud-based speech recognition. Dictation features will use local recognition only, which may be less accurate. Cortana voice features are unaffected (use Disable Cortana).

disableCloudSearch.name: Disable Cloud Search
disableCloudSearch.details: Prevents Windows Search from using Microsoft's cloud services to provide enhanced search results. Search will be limited to local and OneDrive content.

denyCameraAccess.name: Deny Camera Access
denyCameraAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing the camera
denyCameraAccess.details: Blocks all applications from using the camera. Video calling apps like Zoom, Teams, and Skype will not be able to access your camera. Can be overridden in individual app settings.

denyMicrophoneAccess.name: Deny Microphone Access
denyMicrophoneAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing the microphone
denyMicrophoneAccess.details: Blocks all applications from using the microphone. Voice calls, dictation, and voice assistants won't work. Can be overridden in individual app settings.

denyLocationAppAccess.name: Deny Location Access
denyLocationAppAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing location
denyLocationAppAccess.details: Prevents all apps from accessing your device location. Maps, ride-sharing, and location-based apps will not work correctly. System location services are controlled separately.

denyContactsAccess.name: Deny Contacts Access
denyContactsAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing contacts
denyContactsAccess.details: Blocks apps from reading your contact list. Email clients, messaging apps, and social media may lose contact sync functionality.

denyCalendarAccess.name: Deny Calendar Access
denyCalendarAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing calendar
denyCalendarAccess.details: Prevents apps from reading or writing to your calendar. Calendar apps and scheduling tools will not sync events. Does not affect Outlook desktop if using Exchange directly.

denyEmailAccess.name: Deny Email Access
denyEmailAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing email
denyEmailAccess.details: Blocks apps from accessing your email accounts. Mail apps will not sync messages. May affect calendar invitations sent via email.

denyMessagingAccess.name: Deny Messaging Access
denyMessagingAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing messages
denyMessagingAccess.details: Prevents apps from reading or sending SMS/MMS messages. Messaging apps may lose sync functionality.

denyPhoneAccess.name: Deny Phone Access
denyPhoneAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing phone
denyPhoneAccess.details: Blocks apps from making phone calls or accessing call functionality. Primarily affects devices with cellular capability.

denyCallHistoryAccess.name: Deny Call History Access
denyCallHistoryAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing call history
denyCallHistoryAccess.details: Prevents apps from reading your call log. Caller ID apps and dialer replacements will not show call history.

denyTasksAccess.name: Deny Tasks Access
denyTasksAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing tasks
denyTasksAccess.details: Blocks apps from accessing your task and to-do lists. Microsoft To Do and similar apps may lose sync functionality.

denyTrustedDevicesAccess.name: Deny Trusted Devices Access
denyTrustedDevicesAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing trusted devices
denyTrustedDevicesAccess.details: Prevents apps from accessing information about trusted Bluetooth devices and paired hardware.

denyRadiosAccess.name: Deny Radios Access
denyRadiosAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing radio controls
denyRadiosAccess.details: Blocks apps from controlling Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and cellular radios. Apps cannot turn these on or off programmatically.

denyAccountInfoAccess.name: Deny Account Info Access
denyAccountInfoAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing account information
denyAccountInfoAccess.details: Prevents apps from reading your Microsoft account information like username, profile picture, and account type.

denyMotionAccess.name: Deny Motion Data Access
denyMotionAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing motion sensors
denyMotionAccess.details: Blocks access to accelerometer, gyroscope, and compass data. Fitness apps and motion-based games will not work.

denyUserDataAccess.name: Deny User Data Access
denyUserDataAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing user data
denyUserDataAccess.details: Prevents apps from accessing generic user data folders. Some apps may lose the ability to save or load files.

denyVoiceActivationAccess.name: Deny Voice Activation Access
denyVoiceActivationAccess.description: Prevent all applications from using voice activation
denyVoiceActivationAccess.details: Disables 'Hey Cortana' and similar always-listening voice activation features for all apps. Manual voice commands still work if microphone access is allowed.

denyGraphicsCaptureAccess.name: Deny Screen Capture Access
denyGraphicsCaptureAccess.description: Prevent all applications from capturing screen content
denyGraphicsCaptureAccess.details: Prevents apps from taking screenshots or recording your screen. Screen recording tools, streaming apps, and screenshot utilities will be blocked.

denyNotificationsAccess.name: Deny Notifications Access
denyNotificationsAccess.description: Prevent all applications from accessing notifications
denyNotificationsAccess.details: Blocks apps from reading your notification history or posting new notifications. May affect notification center functionality.

cssrssPriority.name: CSRSS High Priority
cssrssPriority.description: Set CSRSS process to high priority for improved input latency
cssrssPriority.details: CSRSS handles mouse and keyboard input. Setting it to high priority can reduce input lag and improve mouse responsiveness.

gameMode.name: Game Mode
gameMode.description: Enable Windows Game Mode for optimized gaming performance
gameMode.details: Game Mode prioritizes games by suspending background processes and allocating more system resources to gaming. May cause some background apps to respond slowly while gaming.

disableFso.name: Disable Fullscreen Optimizations
disableFso.description: Disable Windows fullscreen optimizations for games
disableFso.details: Disables Windows fullscreen optimizations that can cause stuttering and input lag in games. Games will run in exclusive fullscreen mode for best performance.

disableGpuEnergyDrv.name: Disable GPU Energy Driver
disableGpuEnergyDrv.description: Disable GPU power management for maximum performance
disableGpuEnergyDrv.details: Disables the GPU energy driver service. Prevents GPU from entering power-saving states. Increases power consumption and heat. Not recommended for laptops.

disableHibernation.name: Disable Hibernation
disableHibernation.description: Disable hibernation and fast startup to free disk space
disableHibernation.details: Disables hibernation and fast startup features. Frees up disk space equal to your RAM size (hiberfil.sys). Fast startup will no longer be available, but shutdown times remain similar.

shutdownTimeouts.name: Fast Shutdown Timeouts
shutdownTimeouts.description: Reduce wait time for apps to close during shutdown
shutdownTimeouts.details: Reduces the timeout for apps and services to close during shutdown from 20 seconds to 1 second. May cause unsaved work to be lost if apps don't close quickly.

mouseAccelerationFix.name: Disable Mouse Acceleration
mouseAccelerationFix.description: Remove mouse acceleration for consistent aiming
mouseAccelerationFix.details: Disables Windows mouse acceleration (Enhance pointer precision). Provides 1:1 mouse movement for consistent cross-game sensitivity. Popular among FPS gamers.

coreIsolation.name: Disable Core Isolation
coreIsolation.description: Disable memory integrity for maximum performance
coreIsolation.details: Disables Core Isolation/Memory Integrity (HVCI). This security feature can impact gaming performance by 5-15%. Disabling reduces protection against certain memory-based attacks.

spectreMeltdown.name: Disable Spectre/Meltdown Mitigations
spectreMeltdown.description: Disable CPU vulnerability mitigations for performance
spectreMeltdown.details: Disables mitigations for Spectre and Meltdown CPU vulnerabilities. Can improve performance by 5-20% on older CPUs. Significantly reduces security against certain attacks. High risk.

sehop.name: Disable SEHOP
sehop.description: Disable Structured Exception Handler Overwrite Protection
sehop.details: Disables SEHOP security feature. May improve performance slightly but reduces protection against certain exploitation techniques.

tcpNoDelay.name: TCP No Delay
tcpNoDelay.description: Disable Nagle's algorithm for lower network latency
tcpNoDelay.details: Disables Nagle's algorithm for TCP connections. Reduces network latency for real-time applications like gaming. May increase bandwidth usage for small packets.

dnsCache.name: Disable Negative DNS Cache
dnsCache.description: Disable caching of failed DNS lookups
dnsCache.details: Disables caching of negative DNS responses (failed lookups). Useful when troubleshooting DNS issues or when DNS records change frequently. Minimal performance impact.

networkThrottling.name: Disable Network Throttling
networkThrottling.description: Disable Windows network throttling for better network performance
networkThrottling.details: Disables Windows multimedia-based network throttling. Can improve network performance during media playback. Primarily beneficial for Ethernet connections.

msiMode.name: MSI Mode
msiMode.description: Enable MSI mode for GPU and network adapters
msiMode.details: Enables Message Signaled Interrupts for better interrupt handling. Can reduce latency and improve performance. Requires reboot to take effect.

deviceAffinity.name: Device Affinity
deviceAffinity.description: Spread device interrupts across CPU cores
deviceAffinity.details: Distributes interrupt handling for GPU, network adapters, and USB controllers across different CPU cores. Can reduce DPC latency and improve system responsiveness. Requires reboot.

disableFth.name: Disable Fault Tolerant Heap
disableFth.description: Disable FTH to prevent memory-related workarounds
disableFth.details: Disables the Fault Tolerant Heap feature which can cause memory allocation delays. FTH is designed to mitigate memory-related crashes but can impact performance in some applications.

disableBackgroundApps.name: Disable Background Apps
disableBackgroundApps.description: Prevent apps from running in the background
disableBackgroundApps.details: Disables background app execution for all applications. Saves system resources and improves performance. Some apps like mail and calendar may not sync automatically.

heapDecommit.name: Heap DeCommit Threshold
heapDecommit.description: Optimize heap memory release for better RAM management
heapDecommit.details: Sets a threshold for releasing unused heap memory back to the system. Can help maintain more available RAM on systems with heavy memory usage.

disablePageCombining.name: Disable Page Combining
disablePageCombining.description: Disable memory page combining for more consistent performance
disablePageCombining.details: Disables Windows memory page combining feature. Can reduce memory-related latency spikes but may increase overall memory usage.

svchostSplitThreshold.name: SvcHost Split Threshold
svchostSplitThreshold.description: Optimize service host memory allocation based on RAM
svchostSplitThreshold.details: Adjusts the threshold for splitting svchost.exe instances based on your total RAM. Can reduce service host memory usage and improve system responsiveness on systems with more RAM.

disableSuperfetch.name: Disable Superfetch
disableSuperfetch.description: Disable Superfetch service for SSD optimization
disableSuperfetch.details: Disables Superfetch (SysMain) which preloads frequently used applications. Not needed on SSDs and can reduce unnecessary disk activity. May slow down application launch on HDDs.

riskLevel.medium: Medium risk — may affect system stability
riskLevel.high: High risk — may cause system instability
